title: Oru Raja Vanthanam Lyrics Mounam Samatham Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Oru Raja Vandhanaam
enakoru roja thandhanaam
adi vaadi raasathi
unakoru muththam
endraanaam

avan oorai sollu
perai sollaadhe
avan aasai thannai
thaandi sellaadhe (2)

Oru Raja Vandhanaam
enakoru roja thandhanaam
adi vaadi raasathi
unakoru muththam
endraanaam

Thai maasam pongal vaikum
neram vandhaachu
thazhambu engum pooththu
vaasam vandhaachu

Veedengum vaasaal engum
kolam pottachu
vizhiyodu yaekkam vandhu
thookkam poyaachu

oru poongaaththu
adhu soodaachu.
vizh thazh pottu
pala naal aachu

adi pen maanae
idhu yaaraale
adi rasaaththi
vandhu koorendi

Oru Raja Vandhanaam
enakoru roja thandhanaam
adi vaadi raasathi
unakoru muththam
endraanaam

Maharani pattam kaatum
endhan selvaakku
varavendum maalai
vaanil thanga pallaakku

vali engum kondrai pookkal
ponnai thoovattum.
varaverkka vaanam paadi
paattu paadattum

ini oorengum
en rajaangam
adi naal dhorum
varum oorgolam

Oru Raja Vandhanaam
enakoru roja thandhanaam
adi vaadi raasathi
unakoru muththam
endraanaam

avan oorai sollu
perai sollaadhe
avan aasai thannai
thaandi sellaadhe (2)

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Oru Raja Vanthanam'?

The song expresses deep feelings of love and affection, symbolizing the desire for a beloved to bring joy and happiness.

In which movie is 'Oru Raja Vanthanam' featured?

'Oru Raja Vanthanam' is featured in the movie Mounam Samatham.

Who is the singer of 'Oru Raja Vanthanam'?

The song is sung by the renowned playback singer K.S. Chitra.

When was 'Oru Raja Vanthanam' released?

The song was released on January 14, 1989.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Mounam Samatham, 'Oru Raja Vanthanam' serves as a poignant expression of love, where the protagonist yearns for their beloved. The song's soothing melody, combined with K.S. Chitra's enchanting voice, evokes a sense of nostalgia and romance. It beautifully conveys the emotions of longing and affection, making it a cherished classic. This melody is perfect for moments of reflection and celebration of love.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Oru Raja Vanthanam is a timeless romantic melody that captures the essence of love and longing. Sung beautifully by K.S. Chitra, this song from the classic film Mounam Samatham resonates with heartfelt emotions. Its enchanting lyrics and soothing tune make it a perfect choice for any romantic occasion.
stanzaMeanings: A king has come, and he has given me a rose; oh, my beloved, your kiss is like a precious gem.
Don't speak about him or mention his name; don't let his desires go beyond.
The month of Thai has arrived, bringing the festival of Pongal; flowers are blooming everywhere, and the fragrance has come.
Every house has decorations, and the entrance is adorned; with eyes full of joy, the happiness has spread.
A flower has bloomed, and it has blossomed; many days have passed since it opened.
Oh, dear girl, who has come to speak of this; the sweetness has arrived.
A king has come, and he has given me a rose; oh, my beloved, your kiss is like a precious gem.
The queen's crown should shine; my wealth should come like a golden chariot in the sky.
Everywhere, the flowers of the Kondrai tree bloom, and the sky sings songs of welcome.
Now, my kingdom will flourish; the day will come when all the villages will prosper.
The river water will turn sweet, and every day will become a holy day.
A king has come, and he has given me a rose; oh, my beloved, your kiss is like a precious gem.
Don't speak about him or mention his name; don't let his desires go beyond.
